subject: AI Engineer Role - Follow Up
body:
Hi Shivam,

Thanks for our call last week. I wanted to follow up on the AI Engineer position we discussed. The team was impressed with your RAG pipeline experience.

Would you be available for a technical round next week?

Best,
John

subject: Introduction - MediFlow AI Team
body:
Hi Shivam,

I came across your profile and was impressed by your work on DevLens and your experience with LLM pipelines at Northeastern.

We're building an AI-powered medical documentation system and looking for backend engineers with ML experience.

Would you be open to a quick intro call?

Best,
John Doe
Engineering Manager, MediFlow

subject: Founding Engineer Opportunity
body:
Hey Shivam,

We're a YC-backed startup building AI tools for developers. Saw your DevLens project - really cool concept!

Looking for a founding engineer. H1B sponsorship available. Interested in chatting?

Sarah

subject: Backend Engineer - CDN Team
body:
Hi Shivam,

Your experience with distributed systems and FastAPI caught my attention. We're hiring for our CDN infrastructure team.

The role involves building high-throughput APIs and working with Redis/PostgreSQL at scale.

Let me know if you'd like to learn more.

Michael Reed
Senior Recruiter, NetWave

subject: FinTech Backend Role
body:
Hi Shivam,

I'm John Doe from FinCore, a fintech company building payment infrastructure.

Noticed your payment processing experience at LTI. We're looking for Java/Spring Boot engineers.

Interested in discussing?

John

subject: Following up Startup Opportunity
body:
Hi Shivam,

This is Suzy- I texted you earlier about the DevLens project. I wanted to
send more details via email. We're a seed-stage startup building AI-powered
developer tools. H1B sponsorship available. Our tech stack: Python,
FastAPI, PostgreSQL, LLMs (similar to what you built). Would Tuesday or
Wednesday work for a quick intro call?

 Best,
Suzy
